title: Build quality_eval.py harness (grid + nll subcommands, 3 modes, smoke mode)

title: Run depth-stratified synthetic grid (needle single/multi-key/aggregation x ctx 8k/16k/32k x depth bins x modes)

Analysis doc + COMPARISON update + commit/push
check: cd /home/xiaol/X/wkvm && git log --oneline -1 | grep -qi 'quality' && test -f docs/RECURRENT_MODE_QUALITY.md

text: smoke preview: with NON-repetitive filler, banked mode already misses the evicted-depth needle at ctx2048/depth0.2 (ring also 0.00, full 1.00; in-ring depth 0.8 all modes 1.00). PoC-2's 18/18 recall was flattered by repetitive filler as suspected.

grid done, 45 rows: full=1.00 on t1/t2 everywhere incl 32k(chunk1024, no OOM), t3~0.83 (model's own aggregation ceiling). ring=0.00 at every evicted depth, recalls only in-ring (8k depth0.9). banked with honest non-repetitive filler: t1 recovers well but imperfect (0.33-1.00, mean~0.75), t2 collapses at 16k/32k mid depths (0.00 at 16k depths 0.1-0.7; distractor facts compete for rep slots through merge chain), t3 worst (0.00-0.67). One inversion: t3@8k depth0.9 banked 0.17 < ring 0.50.

nll done, 6 docs x 16k (2 tex, 2 md, 2 py): bins 0-2k exact (delta 0.0000, chunked-eviction granularity makes divergence start at 2k). ring delta vs full grows +0.32@2-3k to +0.81@15-16k (peak +1.36@12-13k, high per-doc std 0.38-0.83). banked recovers only ~0.05-0.13 nats of the ring gap everywhere (e.g. +0.61 vs +0.74 @4-5k) - the bank helps targeted recall, barely helps general LM. NO NLL@8k-style inversion on natural text: both lossy modes strictly worse than full past the window, confirming PoC-2's ppl inversion was repetitive-filler artifact.
